title: ILP License
description: License to operate a connector node on the Interledger Network

@context.description: Defines semantic context of the License

type.description: Defines a list of applicable credential types

id.description: Defines unique identifier of the License

issuer.description: Defines the issuer of the license

issuanceDate.description: Defines when the license was issued

issued.description: Defines when the issued credential was issued

expirationDate.description: Defines the date and time, when the license expires

credentialSubject.description: Defines information about the subject that the license is issued to

id.description: Defines the DID of the licensed subject

country.description: Defines the ISO-3166 country code of the licensed subject

credentialSchema.description: Contains information about the credential schema (template) on which the license is based

id.description: References the credential schema (template) stored on the (relevant) Trusted Schemas Registry (TSR) on which the license is based

evidence.description: Contains information about the process which resulted in the issuance of the license

id.description: If present, it MUST contain a URL that points to where more information about this instance of evidence can be found.

proofPurpose.description: Defines the purpose of the proof

created.description: Defines the date and time, when the proof has been created

verificationMethod.description: Contains information about the verification method / proof mechanisms

proofValue.description: Defines the proof value in JWS format
